findings.body: src/state/model-family-separation.ts:7-53 leaves evidence fields optional enough that undefined values can bypass model-family checks; explicitly validate Stage 3 model_family and Stage 2 ownership fields before comparison.
src/state/model-family-separation.ts:138-151 uses field-in checks for Stage 2 ownership fields, allowing undefined, null, or empty strings; require non-empty values for the same field list.
